failedExamples.trajectory: The ground shook. Ignis lunged, flames erupting from its maw. Elaria barely dodged, the heat singeing her armor. She had one chance.
Elaria saw the dragon. They had a polite conversation about the weather for twenty minutes.
The ground shook. Ignis lunged, flames erupting from its maw. Elaria barely dodged, the heat singeing her armor. She had one chance.
